name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ Here's how this bot works:

🔍 Search — find content by typing a query
👤 Profile — see your balance and stats
🔗 Referral — share your link, earn $0.01 per friend
💰 Balance — check your earnings
💸 Withdraw — cash out (min $10)

Tap /start to open the menu, then pick what you want from the buttons.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
